subcodes.first_line: A light from Our presence unto those who are in the world, and verily it is in the form of the Book. Exalted is the All-Bountiful Who hath sent it forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نور من لدنا الی من فی العالم و انه علی هیئه الکتاب تعالی الوهاب الذی ارسله
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @assistance to the poor and lowly; the orphan; the sick, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals
